title: clitoria falcata var. aurantiaca
intro: Clitoria falcata var. aurantiaca, also known as the yellow clitoria, is a variety of the Clitoria falcata plant, which is a flowering plant native to tropical regions of Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Clitoria falcata var. aurantiaca include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of certain cancers. Clitoria falcata var. aurantiaca can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, capsules, and extracts, and is also used in traditional medicine in some parts of Asia.
